//: foundation-integrity :: Claude Code hook wiring. Merge these entries into the repo's .claude/settings.json (project scope, NOT ~/.claude). Same scripts as the git hooks and the Codex config — one implementation, three wirings.
//paths: Adjust the command paths if you vendored templates/hooks/scripts elsewhere.
//exit-codes: A hook exit code of 2 blocks the tool/turn and feeds stderr back to the agent; other non-zero shows a warning. The scripts return 1=warn, 2=block(when FI_BLOCK=1). Default posture is warn.
